title: Football Typographic Perspective Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Football Typographic Perspective Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 premium football star campaign poster for fictional world football star with number 10 in green-gold national color kit, built around a giant perspective typography structure and SPEED / Break the line. Subject: fictional world football star with number 10 in green-gold national color kit appears as the central realistic football star in dynamic match action, with athletic body language, sharp jersey detail, ball control, and strong match-day energy. Scene: stadium tunnel with giant perspective word SPEED forming the visual skeleton creates the stadium campaign environment with grass, lighting, motion lines, perspective depth, and typography acting as part of the spatial skeleton. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 poster layout: central football star overlaps or breaks through huge perspective word art, football and grass remain visible, stadium lights frame the top and back, motion lines drive the action direction, and all text stays integrated as a complete campaign layout. Signature Elements: Giant perspective word skeleton, realistic football star action, national-color kit logic, jersey number, visible football, grass, motion lines, stadium lighting, contact energy, and complete premium campaign poster hierarchy. Style: Premium global sports campaign visual with realistic sports photography, high-impact graphic design, strong typographic perspective, kinetic football energy, and polished commercial poster finish. Color Palette: Use the subject country or team color logic as the accent system, supported by deep stadium contrast, bright field greens, clean white text, bold poster colors, and controlled highlight flares. Lighting: Dramatic stadium floodlights, rim light on the athlete, grass sparkle, text-edge glow, motion highlight streaks, and high-contrast sports-ad depth. Camera: Low-to-mid dynamic sports poster view with heroic scale, sharp player focus, readable ball contact, and perspective typography extending into depth without hiding the athlete. Typography: SPEED / Break the line appears as the main giant title and short subtitle, readable, bold, perspective-aware, and locked into the poster grid rather than floating randomly. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
